[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110110 4
1 1110111 6
2 0001000 1
3 1011000 3
4 1101110 5
5 1100000 2
6 1010000 2
7 0000100 1

01 10 0001011 3
12 21 0000100 1 match 7
23 32 0000000 a
34 43 0100001 2
45 54 0100001 2
56 65 0100001 2
67 76 0001011 3
70 07 1001011 4

02 20 0000000 a
13 31 0001001 2
24 42 0000000 a
35 53 0100001 2
46 64 0100011 3
57 75 0000001 1
60 06 0001011 3
71 17 0001111 4

03 30 0001001 2

25 52 0000000 a

47 74 1000011 3
50 05 0000001 1
61 16 0001011 3
72 27 0000100 1 match 7

04 40 1000011 3
15 51 0000001 1
26 62 0000000 a
37 73 0001001 2
